name: Bread Pudding,chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the bread and place it in a greased casserole dish, filling it about 2/3 full.
2. Mix together 2/3 cup sugar and 2 heaping tablespoons cocoa until combined.
3. Pour this mixture over the bread, tossing to coat evenly.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and stir in the vanilla extract. Add 2 cups milk.
5. Pour this liquid mixture over the bread, ensuring it covers all pieces.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
7. Serve with milk, or with melted butter or cool whip on top.
